pre_user_prompt.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook pre_user_prompt --agent windsurf || true

post_cascade_response.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook post_cascade_response --agent windsurf || true

post_write_code.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook post_write_code --agent windsurf || true

post_read_code.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook post_read_code --agent windsurf || true

post_run_command.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook post_run_command --agent windsurf || true

post_mcp_tool_use.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook post_mcp_tool_use --agent windsurf || true
